query: intentional camera movement ICM abstract blurred photography painterly
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: ICM intentional camera movement, painterly abstract blur

response.objective_caption: Vertical bands of yellow-green and pale cream flow across the frame, with soft transitions between warm and cool tones. No distinct objects, figures, or textures are visible.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: The image is entirely consumed by intentional blur, rendering vertical bands of yellow-green and pale cream into an abstract composition where all detail has dissolved. The photograph abandons representational clarity, presenting only flowing color fields with smeared, unresolved surfaces and no recognizable subject.
